description: Install ESLint 9 and typescript-eslint. Create eslint.config.js using flat config format with typescript-eslint strict ruleset. Add lint and lint:fix scripts. Ignore build/, node_modules/, coverage/. Ensure no conflicts with Prettier. Zero errors on source files required.
title: Add ESLint 9 flat config with typescript-eslint strict

descriptionHistory.description: Install ESLint 9 and typescript-eslint. Create eslint.config.js using flat config format with typescript-eslint strict ruleset. Add lint and lint:fix scripts. Ignore build/, node_modules/, coverage/. Ensure no conflicts with Prettier. Zero errors on source files required.
